articles.title: NASA Revelation: Juno Shows Jupiter’s Storms Like Never Before
articles.summary: NASA’s Juno captures Jupiter’s colossal storms, the Great Red Spot, and Clyde’s Spot, revealing chaotic weather, polar cyclones, and intricate atmospheric mysteries.

articles.title: New EPFO portal: Faster claims, smarter processing & more — what changes for PF members
articles.summary: The Employees Provident Fund Organisation has completed its portal migration and restored online services. Members can now benefit from automated claim pre-validation and upfront error flagging.

articles.summary: Every wealthy person, including Shah Rukh Khan, has a third child. The proverb "Hum do humare do" is not universally applicable

articles.title: Stock market crash: Bloodbath on Dalal Street! Sensex, Nifty50 tank 2% as Trump declares end of truce with Iran - top reasons for sharp fall
articles.summary: Stock market crash: Selling pressure gathered pace during the second half of the session after US President Donald Trump declared that the interim agreement with Iran to end the conflict was "over," reigniting fears of further escalation in the Middle East.

articles.title: 1,500 years of royal heritage, one Boston address: Inside Padmaja Kumari Parmar's home
articles.summary: Princess Padmaja Kumari Parmar of the House of Mewar opened her century-old Boston home — featuring Indian art, a massive lawn, panoramic rooms and a bathtub fit for royalty.

articles.title: Amid E20 petrol debate, why oil marketing companies are not too keen to expand E85 rollout
articles.summary: Automobiles manufactured between 2012 and March 2023 were designed to run on fuel containing up to 10% ethanol, while vehicles produced before April 2025 are not fully compatible with E20 blends either.

articles.title: No rope, no fear: This Tamil Nadu man turned a 55-foot palm tree into a safe climb with a simple idea
articles.summary: The iron staircase, designed much like the spiral staircases seen in residential buildings, wraps around the trunk of the towering palmyra tree, allowing people to climb safely without relying on traditional climbing techniques

articles.title: 7 small business ideas that AI can never replace — and how to start each one
articles.summary: From tiffin services and tailoring to pet care and online tutoring, here are 7 profitable small business ideas that AI genuinely cannot replace — with low investment and strong demand.

articles.summary: BMIP, launched by government, will function complimentary to international insurers as its global recognition requires time

articles.title: 'I came to Mumbai with just a baksa and a dream to make it': Vedanta's Anil Agarwal
articles.summary: Anil Agarwal said each of his companies -- Vedanta Aluminium, Vedanta Iron & Steel, Vedanta Oil & Gas, Vedanta Power -- can become a $100-billion revenue company.

articles.summary: Tenreyro, currently Professor of Economics at the London School of Economics, will take over as IMF Economic Counsellor and Director of the Research Department on August 10

articles.title: Your PF balance to jump soon! EPFO credit interest money on This date
articles.summary: The Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO) will credit 8.25% interest for FY 2025-26 into around 34 crore EPF accounts by July 15, with total interest payouts exceeding Rs 1.44 lakh crore.

articles.title: Does grid curtailment challenge India’s renewable energy growth?
articles.summary: Renewable energy projects continue to face significant grid curtailment, at 33% as of May 2026, as transmission infrastructure additions lag capacity enhancements

articles.title: Fresh Trump tariff threat looms: India’s strong stand on US Section 301 probe that proposes 12.5% duties - explained
articles.summary: According to policymakers and trade experts, the pace of the investigation suggests that the US may replace the existing 10% tariff, which remains in force until July 24, with the proposed forced labour-related tariff.

articles.summary: From Jal Mahal's submerged storeys to the Taj Lake Palace and Neermahal in Tripura, here are India's 5 most beautiful water palaces and the royal stories behind each one.

articles.title: Rupee erases previous gains, tumbles 20 paise against US dollar
articles.summary: The Indian rupee opened weaker against the US dollar on Wednesday. Rising crude oil prices and geopolitical events impacted currency markets. The dollar index strengthened, and Brent crude futures climbed significantly.

articles.title: Mumbai airport big accident averted: Air India, Air India Express planes come face-to-face on runway

articles.summary: Oil prices rose sharply after United States military strikes targeted Iran. These actions followed attacks on commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz. Qatar blamed Iran for striking a liquefied natural gas tanker and an oil supertanker.

articles.title: Govt urges USTR to review its move to levy new tariffs
US revokes Iran oil waiver amid attacks on British tankers in Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: The United States revoked an Iran oil sanctions waiver after recent tanker attacks. Three tankers were struck by projectiles in the Strait of Hormuz. One vessel caught fire off the coast of Oman following the incident.

articles.title: Getty Images calls off Shutterstock merger after UK regulator's divestment demand
articles.summary: Getty Image has ended its planned $3.7 billion merger with Shutterstock. The UK competition regulator required Shutterstock to sell its editorial business. Getty's board decided this condition was not in the company's best interests.

articles.title: Why France is finally accepting air conditioners after years of saying 'no'
articles.summary: Only around 24% of French households have air conditioning, according to France's energy transition agency.

articles.title: India strengthens position as investment destination; FDI rises by 44% to $39 billion in 2025
articles.summary: South Asia witnessed a sharp rise in FDI inflows, which climbed from $34 billion to $46 billion, largely driven by India, where inflows expanded to $39 billion, the report noted.

articles.title: Mahadev case: ED seeks permanent attachment of Rs 940.77 crore assets linked to Vikas Garg
articles.summary: The Enforcement Directorate has moved the Adjudicating Authority seeking confirmation of the provisional attachment of properties worth Rs 940.77 crore linked to EBIX Inc Chairman Vikas Garg in the Mahadev Online Betting syndicate money laundering case.

articles.title: SEBI issues recovery notice to former DHFL promoter Dheeraj Wadhawan over ₹28.62 crore penalty
articles.summary: According to the recovery certificate dated July 7, 2026, SEBI has directed Wadhawan to pay ₹28.62 crore within 15 days of receipt of the notice.

articles.title: Rajesh Exports case: NFRA begins probe after Sebi flags alleged ₹15.15 lakh crore mismatch
articles.summary: The National Financial Reporting Authority (NFRA) has begun its probe into Rajesh Exports, nearly a month after the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Sebi) alleged that the company misrepresented about ₹15.15 lakh crore in revenues in its interim order.
